name: Dixieland Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a skillet.
2. Add the garlic and sauté with the zucchini for a few minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
3. Peel the tomatoes and cut into slices.
4. Place enough zucchini slices at the bottom of an oiled 1 1/2 qt casserole to cover it.
5. Cover the zucchini slices with tomato slices.
6. Continue layering the squash and tomatoes, ending with a layer of sliced tomatoes.
7. Sprinkle the top of the final layer of tomatoes with basil, oregano, and the mixture of seasoned bread crumbs and melted margarine.
8. Bake uncovered for 30 minutes at 350°F in an oven.
